title: The Candour Of Julia's Teeth.
content:
White as Zenobia's teeth, the which the girls
    Of Rome did wear for their most precious pearls.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "The Candour Of Julia's Teeth."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
